blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where settings are copied from one business to another. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete examples or API reads that demonstrate this functionality or its expected outcomes. Additionally, prior steps indicate multiple gaps in the underlying requirements, such as the lack of mobile clock-in/clock-out functionality and geofencing, which further complicates the ability to validate this scenario effectively.
